title: JPMorgan Sees Record Profit as Stock-Trading Climbs 86%
title_cn: 摩根大通利润创历史新高，股票交易量攀升 86%
summary: JPMorgan Chase reported its highest quarterly profit ever as the second-quarter equities haul climbed 86% from a year earlier to $6.03 billion. Gerard Cassidy, head of US bank strategy and large-cap bank analyst at RBC examines the results on “Bloomberg Surveillance.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Rate-Hike Bets Mount Before Inflation Data, Warsh Testimony
title_cn: 沃什的证词显示，在通胀数据公布之前，美联储加息的赌注就增加了
summary: Bond traders ramped up bets for a July interest-rate hike ahead of US inflation data and an appearance by the head of the Federal Reserve that stand to reinforce the need for action.

title_cn: TS Lombard 表示，随着科技经济的繁荣，美联储已经落后了
summary: The Federal Reserve should start tightening policy to constrain the artificial intelligence boom gripping the US, TS Lombard Chief Economist Freya Beamish said.

summary: The latest flare-up of tensions over the Strait of Hormuz is threatening fresh global supply disruptions way beyond oil and gas.

title: Gold Pares Losses as Iran, Waller Remarks Worsen Rate Outlook
title_cn: 伊朗、沃勒表示利率前景恶化，金价收窄跌幅
summary: Gold pared losses after dropping below $4,000 an ounce on Monday, as rising tensions in the Middle East and remarks by a US monetary policymaker raised expectations of interest-rate hikes to curb inflation.

title: Oil Tops $87 a Barrel as Strait of Hormuz Tanker Attacks Mount
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡油轮袭击事件加剧，油价升至每桶 87 美元
summary: Brent oil surged again, topping $87 a barrel for the first time in a month, as the truce between the US and Iran collapsed with fresh attacks on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Thailand Scraps Plan to End Visa-Free Entry for Indian Tourists
title_cn: 泰国取消终止印度游客免签证入境的计划
summary: Thailand will allow 30-day visa-exempted entries by visitors from India, after a proposal to scrap visa-free entry led arrivals from the South Asian nation to drop in a blow to the vital tourism industry.

title: China Urges Normal Hormuz Passage as Trump Reinstates Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普恢复封锁，中国敦促霍尔木兹海峡正常通过
summary: China called for restoring normal passage through the Strait of Hormuz as soon as possible after President Donald Trump reinstated the US blockade of Iranian ships transiting through the vital waterway.

title: Rate Hike Chances Rising as Warsh Takes Center Stage
title_cn: 沃什成为焦点，加息机会上升
summary: Following a spike in oil prices and hawkish commentary from Fed officials, traders see a nearly 50% chance of a July rate hike.

title: Emerging Assets Steady as Middle East Tensions Spur Caution
title_cn: 中东紧张局势引发谨慎，新兴资产保持稳定
summary: Emerging-market stocks and currencies were little changed as investors turned cautious amid escalating tensions in the Middle East and awaited the latest US inflation report for clues on the path of monetary policy.

title: Deutsche Bank’s Saravelos Says Pound Buoyed by Burnham Rhetoric
title_cn: 德意志银行的萨拉维洛斯表示英镑受到伯纳姆言论的提振
summary: Pound traders will be looking for fresh catalysts after a rally in the run-up to Andy Burnham’s expected move into 10 Downing Street, according to Deutsche Bank AG’s George Saravelos.

title: Trump's Hormuz Blockade Sends Oil Soaring; Samsung Explores US ADR Listing | The Pulse 7/14/2026

"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: George Saravelos, Deutsche Bank Global Head of FX Research; Bruna Skarica, Morgan Stanley Chief UK Economist  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lead Drops as LME Inventories Surge the Most Since at Least 1970
title_cn: 随着伦敦金属交易所 (LME) 库存出现至少 1970 年以来最大涨幅，铅下跌
summary: Lead prices dropped after the biggest delivery into London Metal Exchange warehouses in records going back to 1970.

title: Shell Gets More Tax Relief on $20 Billion Nigerian Oil Project
title_cn: 壳牌200亿美元尼日利亚石油项目获得更多税收减免
summary: Nigeria granted Shell Plc a production-linked tax credit for a deepwater project, an incentive that will be offered to other oil majors as Africa’s biggest producer seeks to boost production, according to people familiar with the matter.

summary: Crypto brokerage Blockchain.com Group Holdings Inc. has partnered with Polymarket to offer prediction markets to its users in time for the World Cup semifinals.

title: Ethiopian Air Studies Large Order That Puts Jet Rivals in Play
title_cn: 埃塞俄比亚航空研究大订单，让喷气式飞机的竞争对手陷入困境
summary: Ethiopian Airlines Group is in the final stages of deciding on an aircraft order for as many as 50 jets, as Africa’s largest carrier looks to renew its fleet and expand its foothold on the continent.

title: PBOC Boosts Liquidity to Smooth Tax Payments, Debt Issuance
title_cn: 人民银行增加流动性以顺利纳税和发债
summary: China’s central bank said it’s boosting longer-term liquidity injections through outright reverse repurchase agreements, a move expected to help companies and individuals handle upcoming tax payments and to sustain demand for debt issuance.

title: India Refiners Reap Fuel Export Windfall as War Drives Shortages
title_cn: 战争导致燃料短缺，印度炼油厂获得燃料出口暴利
summary: Oil-product shipments from India are on track to climb to their highest level since September as refiners cash in on robust profit margins after a Russian export ban and hostilities in the Middle East tightened supplies.

title: Fed Hike Bets Mount Ahead of CPI Data, Warsh Hearing
title_cn: Warsh 听证会公布消费者物价指数 (CPI) 数据之前，美联储加息押注不断增加
summary: Bond traders ramped up bets for a July interest-rate hike ahead of US inflation data and an appearance by the head of the Federal Reserve that stand to reinforce the need for action. Bloomberg's Ven Ram reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Credit Suisse Veteran Becomes Lunate-Backed Firm’s Abu Dhabi CEO
title_cn: 瑞士信贷资深人士成为 Lunate 支持的公司阿布扎比首席执行官
summary: Azura Partners, a wealth advisor backed by one of the Middle East’s largest alternative asset managers, named Credit Suisse veteran Yousef Hajjar to oversee its Abu Dhabi operations.

title: Trump Plans Hormuz Charge, Stocks Steady Before Warsh & CPI | The Opening Trade 7/14/2026
title_cn: 特朗普计划发起霍尔木兹冲锋，战争爆发前股市稳定，消费者物价指数 (CPI)开盘交易 7/14/2026
summary:
President Donald Trump reinstated the US blockade of Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanded a 20% reimbursement for all other cargo shipped through the waterway.

US stocks steadied as traders refrained from making big bets ahead of a jam-packed day that will see the unofficial start of the earnings season, along with testimony from Fed Chair Kevin Warsh and US inflation data. Higher crude prices kept bets on a July US interest rate increase in place, with swap markets signaling a chance of a hike when the Federal Reserve meets later this month.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India’s Birla Taps MUFG for $1.5 Billion to Fund Shell Asset Buy
title_cn: 印度 Birla 利用三菱日联金融集团 15 亿美元资助壳牌资产购买
summary: A unit of billionaire Kumar Mangalam Birla’s conglomerate has lined up around $1.5 billion of acquisition financing from Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group Inc. to fund its purchase of Shell Plc’s renewable energy assets in the country, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Ed Miliband Seen as Least Appealing UK Chancellor: Markets Pulse
title_cn: 埃德·米利班德被视为最没有吸引力的英国财政大臣：市场脉搏
summary: Andy Burnham is viewed as bearish for UK assets, with former Labour Party leader Ed Miliband seen as the least market-friendly pick for Chancellor, according to Bloomberg's latest Markets Pulse Survey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nebius to Sell $1 Billion in AI Capacity to Reflection
title_cn: Nebius 将向 Reflection 出售 10 亿美元的人工智能产能
summary: Cloud provider Nebius Group NV agreed to sell more than $1 billion worth of computing power to Reflection AI, a developer of artificial intelligence models that was launched by two former Google DeepMind researchers.

title: IBM Shares Plunge After Sales Miss, CEO Says ‘We Faltered’
title_cn: IBM 股价暴跌 售后小姐、首席执行官称“我们步履蹒跚”
summary: International Business Machines Corp. shares slid after the company reported preliminary second-quarter sales that fell short of expectations, attributing the miss to customers shifting spending to chips and servers.

title: Bailey Says BOE Might Need to Respond If an AI Bubble Bursts
title_cn: 贝利表示，如果人工智能泡沫破裂，京东方可能需要做出回应
summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey warned that the fallout from an artificial intelligence stocks bubble bursting would reach the UK economy and could prompt a response in interest rates. He made the comments during a testimony before Parliament’s Treasury Committee. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Private Capital Is Plugging State Spending Gap, Apollo's Zelter Says
title_cn: 阿波罗的泽尔特表示，私人资本正在填补国家支出缺口
summary: Apollo Global Management President Jim Zelter says private capital is stepping in to fill a financing gap left by governments whose balance sheets can no longer support large-scale industrial capital expenditure. "Government pocketbooks aren’t as buoyant to be able to provide that," Zelter tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Famitsu at 40: Conspiracies, Clicks and the Future of Gaming Media
title_cn: Fami通 40 周年：阴谋、点击和游戏媒体的未来
summary: The weekly publication wears its love of games proudly

title: DeepSeek Mulls New Funding Weeks After $7 Billion Round, FT Says
title_cn: 英国《金融时报》称 DeepSeek 在完成 70 亿美元融资后正在考虑新的融资周
summary: Chinese AI pioneer DeepSeek is considering raising more funds weeks after closing a $7 billion round of financing, the Financial Times reported, citing people with knowledge of the deal.

title: China Solar Giant Longi Green Sees Deeper First-Half Loss
title_cn: 中国太阳能巨头隆基绿能上半年亏损扩大
summary: Longi Green Energy Technology Co. expects its net loss to widen in the first half, despite a surge in solar exports earlier in the year.

title: Singapore Court Declines Stay of Byju’s Founder’s Sentence
title_cn: 新加坡法院拒绝暂缓Byju创始人的刑期
summary: The High Court of Singapore declined a stay on the six-month jail sentence of Byju Raveendran, meaning the founder of the failed education startup risks going to prison if he returns to the city-state.

title: Fed’s Three Picks for Task Force Show AI Bullishness
title_cn: 美联储特别工作组的三名人选显示了对人工智能的看好
summary: Kevin Warsh has argued AI could allow the economy to expand faster without generating as much inflation.

title: Job Hunters Are Using AI to Cheat in Interviews, and Failing at the Office
title_cn: 求职者使用人工智能在面试中作弊，并在办公室失败
summary: This has left managers paranoid — and scrambling to reverse course.

title: Samsung Is Said in Early Discussions on Potential US Listing
title_cn: 据称三星正在就美国上市的可能性进行早期讨论
summary: Samsung Electronics Co. is in the early stages of exploring a potential offering of American depositary receipts, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: ECB Digital Euro Trial Enlists Firms from Revolut to UniCredit
title_cn: 欧洲央行数字欧元试验招募了从 Revolut 到 UniCredit 的公司
summary: Revolut Bank UAB, UniCredit SpA and Deutsche Bank AG are among 36 payment service providers that will participate in a digital euro trial, the European Central Bank said on Tuesday.

title: Malaysia Launches Probe Into Srinivasan’s Johor Startup School
title_cn: 马来西亚对斯里尼瓦桑柔佛创业学校展开调查
summary: Malaysian authorities have launched an immigration probe into a school for technology startups, just months after investor Balaji Srinivasan pitched the educational facility to officials and called for policies to support the project.

title: Philippine Outsourcing Group Cuts Revenue and Jobs Forecasts on AI
title_cn: 菲律宾外包集团下调人工智能收入和就业预测
summary: The Philippines’ main business-process outsourcing group cut its industry revenue and job forecasts — and even warned of possible shrinking future business — with the emergence of artificial intelligence, shifting geopolitical conditions and increased competition.

title: Ericsson Falls as Component Costs Weigh on Networks Unit
title_cn: 组件成本拖累网络部门 爱立信股价下跌
summary: Ericsson AB’s shares fell by the most in about 18 months after the Swedish telecommunications network company said margins for its main business will come under pressure this quarter.

title: State Street to Continue Buying Tech Dips, Veitmane Says
title_cn: 维特曼表示，道富银行将继续买入科技股
summary: Marija Veitmane, equity research head at State Street Global Markets, discusses the artificial intelligence trade and why she sees opportunities in software stocks. "We see analysts stabilizing their margin expectation revenue," Veitmane tells Bloomberg Television. "At the same time, we see institutional investors starting to buy from this big, big underweight position," she adds. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank Billionaire: Nuclear Fusion Is Key to AI Future
title_cn: 软银亿万富翁：核聚变是人工智能未来的关键
summary: SoftBank founder Masayoshi Son said that in the not-so-distant future, nuclear fusion technology will offer the most realistic solution for powering AI data centers’ ballooning needs. He speaks at an annual SoftBank World event in Tokyo.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Shares Rebound After Early Rout as AI Jitters Persist
title_cn: 由于人工智能紧张情绪持续存在，SK 海力士股价在早期溃败后反弹
summary: SK Hynix Inc. erased an early plunge to climb more than 3% in Seoul on Tuesday, underscoring the extreme volatility gripping one of the world’s biggest beneficiaries of the artificial intelligence boom.

title: Trillion Dollar Chip Rout Trains Spotlight on TSMC and ASML Results
title_cn: 万亿美元芯片溃败成为台积电和 ASML 结果的焦点
summary: At a time of acute investor unease over a selloff in AI-inflated tech stocks, this week’s results from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. and ASML Holding NV carry even greater significance than usual.

title: Nvidia Partner GMI Cloud Seeks $635 Million GPU-Backed Bank Loan
title_cn: Nvidia 合作伙伴 GMI Cloud 寻求 6.35 亿美元 GPU 支持的银行贷款
summary: US-based data center operator GMI Cloud is seeking a NT$20.45 billion ($635 million) multi-tranche loan deal supported by customer contracts for graphics processing units, one of the first such financings in Asia that reflects the region’s growing demand for artificial intelligence.

title: Finland’s NestAI Builds Sovereign AI Tools for Europe Militaries
title_cn: 芬兰 NestAI 为欧洲军队打造主权人工智能工具
summary: Finnish artificial intelligence lab NestAI Oy is launching an AI engine that the Finnish and Estonian militaries will use to create sovereign models for planning operations and enabling uncrewed autonomous systems.

title: SoftBank’s Masayoshi Son Sees Fusion as Key to AI’s Future
title_cn: 软银的孙正义将融合视为人工智能未来的关键
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. founder Masayoshi Son said that in the not-so-distant future, nuclear fusion technology will offer the most realistic solution for powering AI data centers’ ballooning needs.

title: India’s Antitrust Body Fines HP $13.3 Million for Cartelizing
title_cn: 印度反垄断机构因卡特尔行为对惠普罚款 1330 万美元
summary: India’s antitrust regulator fined the Indian unit of HP Inc. 1.27 billion rupees ($13.3 million), saying the company colluded with its resellers to rig prices in government procurement tenders.

title: Pure DC Building Finland AI Data Center, Secures Microsoft Deal
title_cn: Pure DC 建设芬兰人工智能数据中心，获得微软交易
summary: Oaktree Capital Management-backed UK firm Pure Data Centres is building a data center in Finland that clients including Microsoft Corp. are slated to use, part of a broader effort to ramp up the digital infrastructure necessary for Europe to build and run more artificial intelligent systems.

title: Saudi Arabia Tops Taiwan’s Drone Buyers in Surprise Splurge
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯出人意料地挥霍率超过台湾无人机买家
summary: Saudi Arabia became the top buyer of Taiwan’s drones last month, purchasing a record amount and paying about 10 times as much as other countries do for each machine.

title: Huawei, Apple Get Boost in China From Memory Costs, IDC Says
title_cn: IDC 称，华为、苹果在中国市场受益于内存成本
summary: Huawei Technologies Co. and Apple Inc. extended their lead atop China’s smartphone market in the June quarter, expanding their shipments as consumers opted to either buy premium devices or skip upgrades, according to IDC.

title: Bank of Singapore Global CIO on Market Outlook
title_cn: 新加坡银行全球首席信息官谈市场前景
summary:
Jean Chia, Global CIO at Bank of Singapore, discusses her outlook for equity markets and the broader investment environment.
She speaks with Shery Ahn on the sidelines of the Bank of Singapore CIO Summit in Hong Kong on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Moonfare Assets Top €4 Billion as PE Platform Draws Rich Clients
title_cn: PE 平台吸引富有客户，Moonfare 资产突破 40 亿欧元
summary: Moonfare’s assets under management topped €4 billion ($4.6 billion) after the private markets investing platform continued to attract inflows from wealthy individuals and family offices.

title: DeepSeek’s Liang Tops Amodei and Brockman as Richest AI Founder
title_cn: DeepSeek 的梁超越 Amodei 和 Brockman 成为最富有的人工智能创始人
summary: DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng’s net worth more than doubled after his firm’s most recent fundraising round, making the Chinese entrepreneur the world’s richest among creators of AI models.

title: South Korea Turns More Bullish on Economy as Chip Boom Rolls On
title_cn: 随着芯片热潮的发展，韩国对经济更加看好
summary: South Korea’s government is taking a more bullish view of the economy than the International Monetary Fund’s recent assessment, maintaining that an artificial intelligence-driven semiconductor boom will continue to outweigh the impact of the Middle East conflict.

title: Supreme Court Justices in Spotlight at Rare Capitol Hill Testimony
title_cn: 最高法院法官在罕见的国会山证词中成为焦点
summary: Amy Coney Barrett and Elena Kagan will appear in back-to-back hearings

title: Lithuania Gets New Cabinet That Aims to Mend Ties With China
title_cn: 立陶宛新内阁旨在修复与中国的关系
summary: Lithuanian lawmakers backed a new government led by Prime Minister Mindaugas Sinkevicius, which reaffirmed its staunch support for Ukraine and plans to normalize ties with China.

title: UK Wasted £10 Billion on Covid Gear in Pandemic, Review Finds
title_cn: 审查发现英国在新冠疫情期间浪费了 100 亿英镑
summary: The UK wasted almost £10 billion ($13 billion) during the Covid-19 pandemic on protective equipment such as masks and gowns that were either defective or remained unused, the country’s inquiry into the outbreak found.

title: Russian Refineries, Ships Hit as Kyiv, Moscow Trade Strikes
title_cn: 基辅和莫斯科贸易罢工袭击俄罗斯炼油厂和船只
summary: Ukraine hit two Russian oil refineries, five tankers and a transshipment area in the Black Sea, while Moscow struck fuel facilities in the Ukrainian port of Odesa as the two sides traded strikes overnight.

title: Trump Plans Hormuz Toll as US-Iran Truce Collapses
title_cn: 随着美伊休战破裂，特朗普计划在霍尔木兹海峡造成伤亡
summary: The US hit Iran with more strikes after announcing plans for a 20% fee on ships using the Strait of Hormuz. In response, Tehran attacked more oil tankers sailing through the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UAE Oil Tankers Attacked While Sailing Dark Through Hormuz
title_cn: 阿联酋油轮在黑暗中穿越霍尔木兹海峡时遭到袭击
summary: Two United Arab Emirates-linked supertankers came under attack while sailing “dark” through the Strait of Hormuz, threatening one of the main methods of getting non-Iranian crude to the global market during the war.

title: Anwar’s Party Quits Malacca Government On Strains With Ally
title_cn: 安华政党因与盟友关系紧张退出马六甲政府
summary: Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s Pakatan Harapan has quit the Malacca state government that’s led by federal ally Barisan Nasional following disagreement over a bill, further straining relations after battling each other in the Johor elections.

title: Chile Economic Euphoria Crashes to Earth as President Kast Faces 1% Growth
title_cn: 总统卡斯特面临 1% 的增长，智利经济欣欣向荣
summary: Chileans elected a pro-market president to revive the economy. They are now getting a reality check as one of Latin America’s richest nations flirts with recession while a rightward regional shift heralds more competition for investment.

title: How the Middle East Has Been Changed Forever
title_cn: 中东如何永远改变
summary: More than 1,000 days of war have upended a region already known for its volatility.

title: Singapore Ministers Win Defamation Case Against Bloomberg
title_cn: 新加坡部长赢得针对彭博社的诽谤案
summary: Two Singapore ministers won a defamation case against Bloomberg LP over the contents of a December 2024 news article about the island nation’s property market.

title: Indian Activist’s Health Worsens in Hunger Strike for Students
title_cn: 印度活动人士因学生绝食而健康状况恶化
summary: The health of a well-known Indian activist is deteriorating more than two weeks into his hunger strike over exam paper leaks, putting pressure on the government to respond to one of the country’s most prominent youth-driven protests in years.

title: Bulgaria Quits Pro-Ukrainian Coalition of the Willing
title_cn: 保加利亚退出亲乌克兰自愿联盟
summary: Bulgaria will no longer be a part of the so-called coalition of the willing, a group of nations that support Ukraine against Russian aggression, according to Prime Minister Rumen Radev.

title: India Summons Iran Envoy After Seafarer Dies in Ship Attacks
title_cn: 海员在船只袭击中丧生后印度召见伊朗特使
summary: India summoned Iran’s deputy ambassador to protest after an Indian seafarer was killed and 10 others injured in attacks on two commercial vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Reeves to Use Last City of London Outing to Defend Fiscal Rules
title_cn: 里夫斯将利用最后一次伦敦金融城郊游来捍卫财政规则
summary: Rachel Reeves will issue a coded warning to the next Labour government by telling a City of London audience on Tuesday night that plans to boost the economy will only succeed with the support of financial markets.

title: US-Iran Truce Collapses as Attacks Worsen and Blockade Returns
title_cn: 随着袭击加剧和封锁卷土重来，美伊休战破裂
summary: The interim peace between the US and Iran effectively collapsed after American forces reimposed a naval blockade and launched another wave of airstrikes, while Tehran attacked more oil tankers sailing through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Magyar Calls for Unity After Vote to Oust Orban’s President
title_cn: 马扎尔在投票罢免欧尔班总统后呼吁团结
summary: Prime Minister Peter Magyar moved to unite Hungary a day after his lawmakers voted to oust the Viktor Orban-allied president, a milestone just three months after watershed elections that ended 16 years of nationalist rule.

title: European Powers Join Forces to Build Anti-Ballistic Systems
title_cn: 欧洲强国联手建立反弹道系统
summary: A coalition of European nations agreed to share research and industrial experience to build an anti-ballistic missile defense, moving away from its reliance on the US as Ukraine struggles against Russia’s onslaught.

title: Iran Sneaks Out Tankers Via Hormuz as Trump Amps Up Threats
title_cn: 特朗普加大威胁力度，伊朗通过霍尔木兹海峡偷偷出动油轮
summary: Iran has reverted to its well-used tactic of going dark to move oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz in recent days, even before the US said it would reimpose a blockade of the country’s ports.

title: Iran-Backed Houthis Strike Saudi Arabia in Major Escalation
title_cn: 伊朗支持的胡塞武装对沙特阿拉伯的袭击严重升级
summary: The Iran-backed Houthi group in Yemen fired ballistic missiles and drones on Saudi Arabia, the worst attack in several years that threatens to draw the rebels into the wider regional conflict between Tehran and Washington.

title: Iran War: US Reinstates Hormuz Blockade, Demands 20% Fee | Daybreak Europe 7/14/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：美国恢复霍尔木兹封锁，要求缴纳20%费用|欧洲黎明 7/14/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, US President Donald Trump has reinstated the blockade of Iranian ships in the Strait of Hormuz, and demanded a 20% reimbursement for all other cargo shipped through the waterway. Brent oil futures spiked above $85 a barrel for the first time in a month.

Bond traders ramped up bets for a July interest-rate hike by the Fed ahead of US inflation data and Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's testimony to Congress. Fed Governor Christopher Waller has signaled that further rate hikes may be warranted should underlying inflation continue to reflect broad-based price pressures.

And the biggest US banks are due to kick off earnings season.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungary Approves Legislation to Remove President
title_cn: 匈牙利批准罢免总统的立法
summary: Hungary's parliamentary vote to amend the constitution crowns a frenetic period of legislative activity since Prime Minister Peter Magyar pledged to reincarnate democracy in the country. The result removed the president, set a limit of three parliamentary terms for legislators and sent allies of former PM Viktor Orban in top courts into retirement. Bloomberg's Zoltan Simon reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anwar Plays Down Need for Snap Poll After Johor Election Defeat
title_cn: 安华淡化柔佛大选失利后举行临时民意调查的必要性
summary: Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim has played down the need to call for a snap poll after his Pakatan Harapan coalition suffered a bruising defeat at Johor state elections over the weekend.

title: UK’s Miliband Seen as Least Market-Friendly Chancellor in Poll
title_cn: 英国米利班德在民意调查中被视为对市场最不友好的总理
summary: Andy Burnham has yet to announce his choice for UK Chancellor of the Exchequer, but among the presumptive next prime minister’s leading candidates, Energy Secretary Ed Miliband is seen as the least market-friendly choice, according to the latest Bloomberg Markets Live Pulse survey.

title: Trump Says US is Reinstating Blockade Against Iran | Balance of Power: Late Edition 07/13/2026
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国将恢复对伊朗的封锁权力平衡：最新版 07/13/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Republican Senator Alan Armstrong of Oklahoma says he would support the Russia sanctions bill championed by the late Senator Lindsey Graham, saying it is in the US interest to support Ukraine and not leave the country "unsupported" in its war with Russia. Kevin Book, Managing Director at ClearView Energy Partners, says oil prices are headed higher as renewed US strikes against Iran raise fresh risks around flows through the Strait of Hormuz. Heather Conley, Nonresident Senior Fellow at the American Enterprise Institute, warns the renewal of US strikes against Iran could further strain US munitions stockpiles and air-defense capabilities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Conley: Iran Conflict Risks Stretching US Defenses
title_cn: 康利：伊朗冲突可能会削弱美国的防御能力
summary: Heather Conley, Nonresident Senior Fellow at the American Enterprise Institute, warns the renewal of US strikes against Iran could further strain US munitions stockpiles and air-defense capabilities. Conley notes the US and its allies are already stretched across the Gulf, Ukraine and the Indo-Pacific, and that a Russia sanctions bill championed by the late Senator Lindsey Graham would have a "big effect" if put into place. She speaks with Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Expels Former Politburo Member Over Graft and Sex Charges
title_cn: 中国因贪污和性指控开除前政治局委员
summary: China expelled former Politburo member Ma Xingrui from the ruling Communist Party, accusing him of a wide range of offenses including corruption, abuse of power and trading political favors for sex.

title: US Hits Iran With Strikes, Blockade as Trump Plans Hormuz Charge
title_cn: 特朗普计划冲锋霍尔木兹，美国对伊朗进行打击和封锁
summary: President Donald Trump reinstated the US blockade of Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanded a 20% reimbursement for all other cargo shipped through the waterway.

title: Australia Curbs Rights of China Investors in Rare-Earths Miner
title_cn: 澳大利亚限制中国投资者对稀土矿商的权利
summary: Australia’s government has moved to block three China-linked shareholders of rare earths miner Northern Minerals Ltd. from voting or exercising other rights after they defied earlier orders to sell their stock.

title: Judge Rules Trump IRS Immunity Deal Has No ‘Basis in Law’
title_cn: 法官裁定特朗普国税局豁免协议没有“法律依据”
summary: A judge ruled that President Donald Trump’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service was a “bad faith” attempt to manipulate the judicial process and barred him and his administration from citing its supposed settlement in any future regulatory or judicial proceedings.

title: Venezuela Names Its US Ambassador as Head of Foreign Policy, Trade
title_cn: 委内瑞拉任命美国大使为外交政策和贸易主管
summary: Venezuela’s Acting President Delcy Rodríguez merged the government’s foreign policy and international trade ministries into a single office headed by Caracas’s ambassador to the US, Félix Plasencia.
